meaning: adj.继续四年的,每四年一次的
examples: The Olympics may be the ultimate quadrennial global competition.
This is especially true during the quadrennial World Cup championship.
The 2010 Quadrennial Defense Review even highlighted it as an area of cooperation with allies in Asia.
However, investment in such capabilities is lagging, as the Quadrennial Defense Review Independent Panel observed.
The Department of Homeland Security quadrennial review, I'm told, didn't use those words, either.
